variants.title: Donaldson P171512 Hydraulic Cartridge
variants.description: Genuine Donaldson P171512 Hydraulic Cartridge offers superior filtration performance, effectively removing contaminants from hydraulic fluids. Its high-capacity design helps maintain fluid cleanliness and system efficiency. Constructed from durable materials, this hydraulic cartridge is suitable for a wide range of industrial and heavy-duty hydraulic systems.
specifications: Style: Hydraulic Cartridge, Media: Wire Mesh, Efficiency 1: 90µ @ β2, Outer Diameter: 49.0 mm, Inner Diameter: 22.0 mm, Length: 95.0 mm, Efficiency 1 The efficiency of the element is shown using the Micron (µ) and Beta (β) ratings. The micron rating indicates the size of the particle being filtered and the beta rating the efficiency , calculated as 1/β. E.g. a rating of β200 will be 99.5% efficient whereas β1000 would be 99.9%.: 90µ @ β2, Media Type: Wire Mesh
